sam-un-√nam (-ud-√nam) P. -namati, to rise up or ascend together, rise aloft, ascend,  Bhaṭṭ.  :
Caus. -nāmayati or -namayati, to raise well up, erect, lift completely up, elevate,  MBh. ;  Śak. ;  Śuśr.
